title: Anatomy of a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)
description: A layered diagram showing the key architectural components of a CNN and their progression from input to output.
relationships: Data flows sequentially from the Input Layer through a repeated stack of Convolution, Activation, and Pooling layers for hierarchical feature extraction, is then flattened into a 1D vector, and finally processed by Fully Connected layers to produce a classification in the Output Layer.
